limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No AI-attributable dollar amounts or named AI investment programs disclosed in excerpts; data center mention is a client-sector reference for IPS consulting services, not Berkshire's own AI investment. Score of 2 reflects generic/indirect association only.

ai_narrative_concreteness: AI is mentioned only in the risk-factors section in the context of regulatory compliance; no named AI initiatives, use cases, or deployment details appear in the excerpts. Score reflects aspirational/regulatory framing rather than operational AI narrative.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section content is present and names AI regulation and compliance risk with a specific consequence (reputational damage, economic penalties), qualifying as named risk categories, but lacks company-specific mechanisms or quantification.
Excerpts are limited and may not capture the full scope of AI-related disclosures in the complete filing.
